2606.25757.title: OPERA: Aligning Open-Ended Reasoning via Objective Perplexity-based Reinforcement Learning
2606.25757.paper_summary: Reinforcement Learning (RL) has enabled LLMs to excel in objective reasoning tasks such as mathematics and code generation. However, applying RL to open-ended tasks, such as creative writing, remains challenging because LLM-as-a-judge reward models often exhibit stylistic biases and positional inconsistencies, leading to unstable supervision. To address this, we propose OPERA (Objective Perplexity-based Reflective Alignment), which replaces unreliable external judges with intrinsic rewards derived from perplexity dynamics. Specifically, we derive an intrinsic reward signal from perplexity dynamics, quantifying uncertainty reduction at critical reflective states. During the cold-start phase, we introduce a data synthesis method that leverages carefully designed guiding words to generate diverse reasoning traces, along with perplexity-prioritized rollouts that utilize internal log-probabilities to identify logically consistent reasoning branches. This pipeline yields a large-scale dataset comprising 20,000 high-quality reasoning trajectories. Empirical evaluations consistently demonstrate the scalability and efficacy of our approach in alignment for open-ended tasks. Implementing OPERA on Qwen3-8B establishes a new state-of-the-art among open-source models, achieving parity with or surpassing proprietary models like Gemini2.5 and MiniMax-M2.5 in some open-ended tasks. The code is available at https://github.com/pangpang-xuan/OPERA.
2606.25757.paper_summary_zh: 強化學習（RL）使得大型語言模型（LLMs）在數學和程式碼生成等目標推理任務中表現優異。<lb/>然而，將RL應用於開放式任務，如創意寫作，仍然具有挑戰性，因為LLM作為評判者的獎勵模型往往表現出風格偏見和位置不一致，導致不穩定的監督。<lb/>為了解決這個問題，我們提出了OPERA（基於困惑度的客觀反思對齊），它用源自困惑度動態的內在獎勵替代不可靠的外部評判者。<lb/>具體而言，我們從困惑度動態中推導出內在獎勵信號，量化在關鍵反思狀態下的不確定性減少。<lb/>在冷啟動階段，我們引入了一種數據合成方法，利用精心設計的引導詞生成多樣的推理痕跡，以及利用內部對數概率識別邏輯一致推理分支的困惑度優先展開。<lb/>這個流程產生了一個包含20,000個高質量推理軌跡的大型數據集。<lb/>實證評估一致顯示我們的方法在開放式任務對齊中的可擴展性和有效性。<lb/>在Qwen3-8B上實施OPERA建立了開源模型中的新最先進技術，在某些開放式任務中達到或超越了像Gemini2.5和MiniMax-M2.5等專有模型的平行性。<lb/>代碼可在https://github.com/pangpang-xuan/OPERA獲得。
2606.25757.author: Wenxuan Jiang et.al.
2606.25757.authors: Wenxuan Jiang, Zining Fan, Zijian Zhang, Xuecheng Wu, Hongming Tan, Haoyang Dai, Xiaoyu Li, Xuezhi Cao, Ninghao Liu
